title: Sye
overview: Sye is a 2005 Indian Kannada-language action film directed by Arun Prasad P.A. featuring Sudeep and Kanika in the lead roles. The film features background score and soundtrack composed by Gurukiran and lyrics by Kaviraj and V. Manohar. The film was released on 1 July 2005. This film is remake of Tamil movie Dhill.  Chakri, whose ambition is to become a police officer, falls in love with Kannika. The harmony in Chakri's family is threatened when a corrupt police officer Mosale provokes Chakri.
